channel.title: d3viant0ne/awesome-rethinkdb Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: d3viant0ne/awesome-rethinkdb May 9th - May 15th, 2016
item.description:
Articles

  • Nicholas Duffy | 30-Apr-15 - Getting Started with the RethinkDB Connector for LoopBack.
  • Shahid Shaikh | 08-Mar-16 - Building real time polling app using RethinkDB and Nodejs.
  • Dr. Gleb Bahmutov PhD | 08-Feb-16 - Redux and RethinkDB
  • Scott Hasbrouck | 13-Mar-16 - Using Socket.Io With RethinkDB Changefeeds To Build A Reactive JavaScript Stack
  • Khalid Abuhakmeh | 15-Nov-15 - Getting Started With RethinkDB and ASP.NET 5.
  • Slava Akhmechet | 01-Sept-15 - Build real-time Web apps with RethinkDB.
  • Justin for Fanout | 20-May-15 - Building a realtime API with RethinkDB.
  • Rob Conery | 17-Apr-15 - RethinkDB 2.0 Is Amazing.
  • Gordon Dent | 01-Apr-15 - A Comprehensive Guide to moving from SQL to RethinkDB.
  • Gordon Dent | 11-Mar-15 - We use RethinkDB at Workshape.io.

    • Talks

  • Michael Glukhovsky at Clevertech | 30-Mar-16 - RethinkDB Presentation to Clevertech.
  • Ryan Paul at ForwardJS | 21-Jan-16 - RethinkDB: Database for realtime apps.
  • Rob Conery at DevDay 2015 | 17-Sept-15 - Rethinking NoSQL.
  • Jorge Silva at RethinkDB Meetup | 29-June-15 - Data Modeling in RethinkDB.
  • Ben Tranter | 05-Apr-15 - A Simple REST API with Express, RethinkDB, and Thinky.
  • Ryan Paul at Mattermark | 17-Feb-15 - Build a realtime RethinkDB cluster monitoring app with live graphs.
  • Associated Sourcestars6
  • Associated Blog Post - A realtime RethinkDB cluster monitoring app with live graphs.

    • Administrative Tools

  • RethinkDB CLIstars21 - CLI and REPL for Rethinkdb.
  • RethinkDB Nightly - A node module that will execute a nightly backup and push it to S3.
  • Chateaustars204 - Another (awesome) data explorer for RethinkDB.

    • Deployment

  • Vagrantstars47 - Install RethinkDB using Vagrant.
  • Puppetstars4 - Puppet module for RethinkDB.
  • Chefstars15 - Chef RethinkDB cookbook.
  • Wreckerstars10 - Wercker box for RethinkDB.
  • Docker - Single node Dockerfile.

    • Community

  • RethinkDB Google Group
  • RethinkDB YouTube Channel
  • RethinkDB Reddit

    • RethinkDB Examples

  • RethinkDB ccoenraets/nodecellar Forkstars14 - Sample app built with Backbone.js,Bootstrap, Node.js, Express, RethinkDB.
  • RethinkDB NodeJS Chatstars206 - A node.js chat application running on rethinkdb.
  • RethinkDB Flask Backbone ToDostars126 - A canonical backbone todo application running on flask and RethinkDB.
  • RethinkDB PubNub Live Blogstars23 - PubNub / Express Blog Example App.
  • RethinkDB Angular Express Promise - Promise based Todo example with RethinkDB, ExpressJS and AngularJS .
  • RethinkDB Angular Express - Todo example with RethinkDB, ExpressJS and AngularJS.
  • RethinkDB Angular KOA - Todo example with RethinkDB, KoaJS and AngularJS.

    • Community Examples

  • Go RethinkDB ToDostars64 - Go RethinkDB Todo List Example Application.
  • Megucastars299 - High performance real-time imageboard in Go, TypeScript and RethinkDB.
  • VueJS RethinkDBstars63 - Vuejs + Express + RethinkDB example.
  • Meteor GraphQLstars45 - A Meteor and RethinkDB Example Using GraphQL.
  • Boot RethinkDBstars38 - Chat example with spring boot and RethinkDB.
  • 3reestars858 - An example universal JS application written with the 3REE stack, React + Redux + RethinkDB + Express.
  • RethinkDB Chatstars69 - A simple chat applications built with RethinkDB + Sockets.
  • RethinkDB Reactjsstars22 - rethinkdb + react.js + ActionController::Live (Rails) + Server Side Events.
  • Realtime Chat RethinkDBstars26 - A realtime chatroom built with RethinkDB
    • Drivers
  • Rethinkerstars1 - A simplistic serialisation library for use alongside the official RethinkDb Java driver.
  • Maintainer: Dave Hrycyszyn
  • Rethinkdb4jstars1 - Asynchronous Netty-based RethinkDB driver for Java.
  • Maintainer: Anton Ustyuzhanin
    • ORM
  • RethinkDB Java ORMstars2 - A custom POJO converter for RethinkDB Java driver.
  • Maintainer: Peter Knego
  • NoBrainerstars381 - Ruby ORM for RethinkDB.
  • Maintainer: Nicolas Viennot
    • Technology Integrations
  • RabbitMQ - Integrating RethinkDB with RabbitMQ
  • Maintainer: RethinkDB Team
  • Epiphystars8 - Lightweight RethinkDB ORM.
  • Maintainer: Vinh Quốc Nguyễn
  • lotus-rethinkdbstars6 - RethinkDB adapter for Lotus::Model.
  • Maintainer: Angelo Ashmore
  • RabbitMQ - Integrating RethinkDB with RabbitMQ
  • Maintainer: RethinkDB Team

item.title: d3viant0ne/awesome-rethinkdb May 2nd - May 8th, 2016
item.description:
Drivers
  • RethinkDB Ruby - Officially Supported Ruby Driver.
  • Maintainer: RethinkDB Team
  • RethinkDB Java - Officially Supported Java Driver.
  • Maintainer: RethinkDB Team
  • RethinkDB JavaScript - Officially Supported JavaScript Driver.
  • RethinkDB Python - Officially Supported JavaScript Driver.
  • Maintainer: RethinkDB Team
  • Maintainer: RethinkDB Team
  • Maintainer: Michel
  • RethinkDB Dashstars860 - An advanced Node.js driver for RethinkDB with connection pool and Streams Support.
    • ORM
  • Maintainer: Andrei Horak
  • Rethinkstars15 - Python RethinkDB Object Mapper Interface Inspired by Appengine NDB.
  • Maintainer: Kevin Amerson
  • Maintainer: Michel
  • Maintainer: JS Data Organization
  • Remodelstars196 - Very simple yet powerful and extensible Object Document Mapper for RethinkDB, written in Python.
    • Technology Integrations
  • flask-rethinkdbstars27 - Adds RethinkDB support to Flask.
  • Maintainer: Andrei Horak
  • RabbitMQ - Integrating RethinkDB with RabbitMQ
  • Maintainer: RethinkDB Team
  • Maintainer: Thomas Eng
  • Maintainer: Matt Wielbut
  • Maintainer: Hao-kang Den
  • Maintainer: RethinkDB Team
  • Hapi RethinkDB CRUDstars3 - CRUD handlers for Hapi interaction with Rethinkdb.
    • Extension Libraries
  • Maintainer: Hao-kang Den
  • Maintainer: @armenfilipetyan

    • Community

  • RethinkDB Blog

item.title: d3viant0ne/awesome-rethinkdb Apr 25th - May 1st, 2016
item.description:
Community Supported Drivers

  • C#stars350 - A C#/.NET RethinkDB driver striving for 100% ReQL API coverage.
  • C++stars87 - RethinkDB driver for C++.
  • Clojurestars198 - A RethinkDB client for Clojure.
  • Dartstars36 - A Dart driver for RethinkDB v2.0.3.
  • Elixirstars497 - Multiplexed RethinkDB client in pure Elixir.
  • Gostars1.6k - Go language driver for RethinkDB.
  • Haskellstars91 - RethinkDB client library for Haskell.
  • Lispstars43 - RethinkDB driver for Common Lisp.
  • Luastars35 - Rethinkdb driver in Lua.
  • Objective-Cstars13 - A RethinkDB client written in Objective-C.
  • Perlstars22 - A Pure Perl RethinkDB Driver.
  • PHPstars349 - A PHP client driver for the RethinkDB query language (ReQL).
  • Scalastars99 - Scala Driver for RethinkDB.

    • Documentation

  • RethinkDB - RethinkDB Documentation
  • ReQL API - JavaScript ReQL command reference

    • Community

  • Request Slack Invite
  • RethinkDB StackOverflow
    • ORM
  • Thinkystars1.1k - JavaScript ORM for RethinkDB
  • JSData RethinkDBstars34 - RethinkDB adapter for the js-data ORM.
    • Extension Libraries
  • RethinkDB Poolstars17 - Connection-pool for RethinkDB.
  • Express Session RethinkDBstars25 - RethinkDB session store for Express 4.x.
    • Technology Integrations
  • Sails Hook Thinkystars19 - A hook to enable the Thinky ORM for RethinkDB in Sails.
  • KOA RethinkDBstars17 - Koa middleware that gets you a RethinkDB client.
  • RabbitMQ - Integrating RethinkDB with RabbitMQ
